Peter,

It’s no secret that the public education system is radically changing in America.

Just turn on the news and you’ll see another story about how liberal policies are being forced on our children with zero tolerance for any other viewpoints. And this isn’t just happening in states like New York and California - these radical policies are cropping up across the South.

If you need proof, just look at what’s happening in Virginia. The Department of Education is pushing to reform it’s curriculum to promote equity and social justice...by removing all accelerated math classes before 11th grade.

**You read that right - woke democrats are canceling Math because it no longer fits into their radical agenda.**
|

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Praying for all of America’s leaders today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Please join me in prayer today for America. Read more >>
Peter, Today is National Day of Prayer, and I hope that all of my supporters will join me in offering up a few words to God. It’s been a tough year for many in Oklahoma and across America, but God’s will always prevails, and his mercies never cease. I’ve heard from many folks in our district that the Lord has seen them through some dark time recently, and for that I’m especially grateful. I feel tremendously blessed in my own life. God gave me an able body to work hard to provide for my family, and He has paved the way to put me in a position to fight for my fellow Americans in the halls of Congress. I pray every day for wisdom in how to best help my fellow Americans, and I pray for our nation’s leaders that they may receive God’s grace and wisdom as well. **Please join me today in praying for all of our leaders, that they may follow God’s will and that our nation may be blessed because of it**. In Him,
Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/0b18bd034ed44e61/9dd3e18b634acc36c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/0b18bd034ed44e61/922a90b7460e5fd9c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

It’s been a tough year for many in Oklahoma and across America, but God’s will always prevails, and his mercies never cease. I’ve heard from many folks in our district that the Lord has seen them through some dark time recently, and for that I’m especially grateful. I feel tremendously blessed in my own life. God gave me an able body to work hard to provide for my family, and He has paved the way to put me in a position to fight for my fellow Americans in the halls of Congress. I pray every day for wisdom in how to best help my fellow Americans, and I pray for our nation’s leaders that they may receive God’s grace and wisdom as well. Please join me today in praying for all of our leaders, that they may follow God’s will and that our nation may be blessed because of it. name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES VOTER REGISTRATION, MOBILIZATION EFFORT AHEAD OF HD34 SPECIAL ELECTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MAY 6, 2021
GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES VOTER REGISTRATION, MOBILIZATION EFFORT AHEAD OF STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34 SPECIAL ELECTION
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia launched a voter registration and mobilization effort ahead of the special election for Georgia House District 34 on Tuesday, June 15. The seat, which covers parts of the city of Marietta in Cobb County, was vacated last week when former State Representative Bert Reeves resigned his position to pursue another opportunity. Greater Georgia will deploy a team of staff, volunteers, and organizers to register conservative-leaning voters ahead of the deadline, as well as put boots on the ground to get out the vote through door-to-door canvassing, phone-banking, texting, and handwritten mail.
"Greater Georgia is taking the lead to register and engage more voters ahead of the special election for State House District 34. We are marshaling our resources to ensure that we turn out the vote on June 15 to protect individual liberties and create more opportunities for hardworking Georgians," Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler said. "At such a pivotal time for our state, Greater Georgia is laser-focused on sending elected officials to the General Assembly who will champion the pro-growth, conservative values that uplift all communities."
KEY DATES:
* Voter registration deadline: Monday, May 17
* Advance, in-person early voting begins: Monday, May 24
* Election Day: Tuesday, June 15

To register to vote, visit [www.greatergeorgia.com/register](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zFruQvRy8UnK5EUJQF5Ql5uc1jWySnswvH13S9ldo_YgvsB3DgeH-ZDz5tfDD2U6q_CHWV9JZysn-lsPZYvfEjRbIZpH9TsrCUeQojCkwTVvExVBm3dTRzTDDgmJjCujzAhEcJcJHrKA8y0XR-GclZrxW79d-b5I&c=qMlmLbkSLT3CUyTs_TLcrSbK_Lj6UCaQ5vFir4BmPpFHabxhUaBP1g==&ch=R9dJuZ9IsHvjbU5vqbW5RxJ_s1971IeJKKgwM-VgD3rs3thBZ5oomQ==&jrc=1).
To sign up to volunteer and get involved in Greater Georgia's effort ahead of this election, visit [www.greatergeorgia.com/volunteer](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zFruQvRy8UnK5EUJQF5Ql5uc1jWySnswvH13S9ldo_YgvsB3DgeH-ZDz5tfDD2U64gp2f44AeU3ZqFAuyvHwNdbH7ejuG5e9q18PiiOQSGn6eh4cqpiPgh50DtDyHIWoafDAYmCfMaAGlPqa48_Q4uJ_JjDoqQJpK3CfTT0yMjI=&c=qMlmLbkSLT3CUyTs_TLcrSbK_Lj6UCaQ5vFir4BmPpFHabxhUaBP1g==&ch=R9dJuZ9IsHvjbU5vqbW5RxJ_s1971IeJKKgwM-VgD3rs3thBZ5oomQ==&jrc=1).

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MAY 6, 2021 GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES VOTER REGISTRATION, MOBILIZATION EFFORT AHEAD OF STATE HOUSE DISTRICT 34 SPECIAL ELECTION ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia launched a voter registration and mobilization effort ahead of the special election for Georgia House District 34 on Tuesday, June 15. The seat, which covers parts of the city of Marietta in Cobb County, was vacated last week when former State Representative Bert Reeves resigned his position to pursue another opportunity. Greater Georgia will deploy a team of staff, volunteers, and organizers to register conservative-leaning voters ahead of the deadline, as well as put boots on the ground to get out the vote through door-to-door canvassing, phone-banking, texting, and handwritten mail. "Greater Georgia is taking the lead to register and engage more voters ahead of the special election for State House District 34. We are marshaling our resources to ensure that we turn out the vote on June 15 to protect individual liberties and create more opportunities for hardworking Georgians," Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler said. "At such a pivotal time for our state, Greater Georgia is laser-focused on sending elected officials to the General Assembly who will champion the pro-growth, conservative values that uplift all communities." KEY DATES: Voter registration deadline: Monday, May 17 Advance, in-person early voting begins: Monday, May 24 * Election Day: Tuesday, June 15 To register to vote, visit . To sign up to volunteer and get involved in Greater Georgia's effort ahead of this election, visit . subject: For ten years, Ron Johnson has failed us

body:
Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2d1a3429-275c-eb11-a607-00155d43c992/614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTRlZGUxZS03Y2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1wOQkqD8XZP138wJ_SL_J5aKebb_okHqBnk7KwwEEs=&id=117942571) During this unprecedented and challenging time, please only donate to our campaign if you can afford to do so.

| | Friend,

Ron Johnson has:
* Continuously downplayed the COVID-19 pandemic and invited anti-vaxxers and other medical quacks to testify in the Senate, recklessly putting countless lives in danger as COVID-19 wrecked our state
* Crusaded against survival checks for the millions of struggling Americans saying we could not afford to add to the deficit
* Pushed legislation that gave billionaires tax breaks as workers suffered
* Supported Donald Trump’s treasonous attempts to overturn a fair election

I know I’ve had enough of Ron Johnson’s repeated failures, _and that is why I am running to replace him in the Senate_ , but I want to hear from you.
| [Do you want to fire Ron Johnson in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28750715/284216300/-2092544423?refcode=TN_EM_SV_NTL_recurring&refcode2=614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTRlZGUxZS03Y2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1wOQkqD8XZP138wJ_SL_J5aKebb_okHqBnk7KwwEEs=&emci=2d1a3429-275c-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&emdi=614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15112925) | [Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28750717/284216301/-2092544423?refcode=TN_EM_SV_NTL_recurring&refcode2=614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTRlZGUxZS03Y2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1wOQkqD8XZP138wJ_SL_J5aKebb_okHqBnk7KwwEEs=&emci=2d1a3429-275c-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&emdi=614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15112925) | [No](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28750719/284216304/-2092544423?refcode=TN_EM_SV_NTL_recurring&refcode2=614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTRlZGUxZS03Y2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1wOQkqD8XZP138wJ_SL_J5aKebb_okHqBnk7KwwEEs=&emci=2d1a3429-275c-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&emdi=614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15112925)

My Wisconsin roots run deep, and as a County Executive that has won six times in a red county, I understand the needs of Wisconsinites from every corner of the state. Meanwhile, Ron Johnson has been one of the main cheerleaders for Donald Trump's quest to overturn a fair election, single-handedly blocked survival checks to struggling families, and continued to say we were "overreacting" to COVID-19.

Ron Johnson has failed us far too many times in just this past year, let alone the damage he has done in the past ten years. We can’t let it continue. [That’s why I am reaching out to hear if you want to help fire Ron Johnson in 2022. Take our survey→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28750721/284216308/-2092544423?refcode=TN_EM_SV_NTL_recurring&refcode2=614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTRlZGUxZS03Y2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1wOQkqD8XZP138wJ_SL_J5aKebb_okHqBnk7KwwEEs=&emci=2d1a3429-275c-eb11-a607-00155d43c992&emdi=614ede1e-7cae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15112925)

Tom Nelson

name: Tell Facebook (LeftAction)
subject: Tell Facebook: “Make the Trump Ban Permanent”
body:
FB must decide within 6 months whether to keep or lift the ban
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/fb-trump-ban?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_

---
| | | Hi Friend, **_UPDATE: Facebook must decide within 6 months whether to keep or end Trump's ban. Tell them to make it permanent! _**
### **[Tell Facebook: "Make Trump Ban Permanent"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T076ad13e-c1a0-4178-af27-409277fe348f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
A Facebook advisory board has temporarily held up FB’s suspension of Trump’s account, but given the company 6 months to decide whether or not to reverse it. **[Please join us in urging Facebook to make the ban permanent.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted3a7bc2-e478-4845-ab65-35d61563bcf7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** A temporary ban is a good start, but Trump has used his account to incite violence and insurrection, and he should not have this powerful megaphone to spread his lies. [**Tell Facebook: “Make the Trump Ban Permanent”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34f07cf9-147c-4418-9a4a-2a72c9ec1d97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb4d44fa-6a4d-4239-a0e1-47f3d55c4936/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: We can do so much better than Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter,

I'm Sarah Godlewski, 5th generation Wisconsinite, proud packer shareholder, and candidate for the United States Senate. **I'm running to replace Ron Johnson in Washington, and I hope you'll let me tell you why.**

In the past few months and years, Ron Johnson has failed Wisconsin time and time again. He's pushed conspiracy theories, denied climate change, spouted racist talking points, voted to enrich the mega-wealthy, lied about the last election, and enabled right-wing extremists (including the previous president).

**I couldn't be more different than Ron Johnson.** Unlike him, I've spent my entire career working to improve the lives of others. At the Pentagon, I rooted out wasteful spending and helped our country better support our troops. As Wisconsin's State Treasurer, I've given more money to schools to help kids learn virtually during the pandemic, taken a Wisconsin-first approach to investing state funds, and backed green energy projects.

I think Washington could use more leaders who will look out for the best interests of working families, and that's what I'm running to do.

As your Senator, I'll fight for a $15 minimum wage, a real strategy to tackle climate change, fundamental reforms to our justice system to combat systemic racism, help for small businesses, and affordable health care for everyone. And if it takes abolishing the filibuster to get it done, then I'll fight for that too.

Now the naysayers have told me not to even try taking on Ron Johnson -- that the super PACs and national Republicans will never let us win. But I say they haven't met a real Wisconsin grassroots team yet. In fact, _Inside Elections_ is calling Wisconsin a battleground race! We can win this race -- a race that could very well be the one that decides the fate of the Senate majority.

clean_body: Peter, I'm Sarah Godlewski, 5th generation Wisconsinite, proud packer shareholder, and candidate for the United States Senate. I'm running to replace Ron Johnson in Washington, and I hope you'll let me tell you why. In the past few months and years, Ron Johnson has failed Wisconsin time and time again. He's pushed conspiracy theories, denied climate change, spouted racist talking points, voted to enrich the mega-wealthy, lied about the last election, and enabled right-wing extremists (including the previous president). I couldn't be more different than Ron Johnson. Unlike him, I've spent my entire career working to improve the lives of others. At the Pentagon, I rooted out wasteful spending and helped our country better support our troops. As Wisconsin's State Treasurer, I've given more money to schools to help kids learn virtually during the pandemic, taken a Wisconsin-first approach to investing state funds, and backed green energy projects. I think Washington could use more leaders who will look out for the best interests of working families, and that's what I'm running to do. As your Senator, I'll fight for a $15 minimum wage, a real strategy to tackle climate change, fundamental reforms to our justice system to combat systemic racism, help for small businesses, and affordable health care for everyone. And if it takes abolishing the filibuster to get it done, then I'll fight for that too. Now the naysayers have told me not to even try taking on Ron Johnson -- that the super PACs and national Republicans will never let us win. But I say they haven't met a real Wisconsin grassroots team yet. In fact, Inside Elections is calling Wisconsin a battleground race! We can win this race -- a race that could very well be the one that decides the fate of the Senate majority. = | = Thank you so much, Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. As I’m sure you know, there’s a lot of money in politics, Peter. So, I can understand why folks often ask me: **Who powers _our_ campaign?** The answer is easy — it’s folks like you! People like Naz in Mclean, Raymond in Fairfax, and Elizabeth in Alexandria, who have all given in just the past few weeks. I’m so humbled by the countless Virginians who have supported our campaign by chipping in a few hard-earned dollars at a time. And I’m proud as I know these folks contribute because they believe in what we’re fighting for — a Virginia where everyone has a seat at the table, and everyone has an opportunity to succeed. To be honest, we have a tough road ahead and the only way we win this thing is with the support of folks like you. **So, will you chip $10 and say you’re all in for this people-powered movement? name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Voting has already started in this special election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Here’s why your support today is so important:
#

I launched Policy is Personal PAC to build progressive power by electing more leaders who will pursue bold policy solutions in Washington. Today, I’m proud to share with you why **I’m endorsing Melanie Stansbury in New Mexico’s 1st Congressional District.**
This is the seat that my friend, Interior Secretary Deb Haaland, formerly held. We need to make sure that another strong progressive holds this seat — and I know Melanie is the person for the job.
**[The special election is June 1 and early voting has already begun, so we have no time to waste. Please split a donation between her campaign and Policy is Personal PAC today. Anything you can afford to give will immediately be put to use to help Melanie win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28758578/284249022/1235616918?refcode2=55f48d99-90ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210506-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWY0OGQ5OS05MGFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AKUnP_kjiyPbr_ye3LeoHXBEZHVAj8I2EWZ_mMPcEQ=)**
Melanie is up against a self-funding millionaire Republican opponent who is trying to buy a Congressional seat. But like me, Melanie knows firsthand what it’s like to struggle to get by. She grew up in a working family in Albuquerque and has dealt with housing and food insecurity. She knows what it’s like to not have health insurance.
Melanie has dedicated her career to helping working people get ahead and stay ahead. In the New Mexico House of Representatives, she has been a leader in fighting climate change, alleviating hunger, and tackling the COVID pandemic.
If we’re going to send Melanie to Washington to join in our fight, and protect our majority in the House, we need to make sure her campaign has the resources it needs. Republicans are spending more money in the district than they have in years. We can’t let the GOP and their corporate special interest backers buy this seat.
**[Please, could you split a donation between Melanie’s campaign and our PAC today? Melanie’s campaign isn’t taking corporate money, so she’s relying on people like you and me chipping in whatever we can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28758579/284249023/1235616918?refcode2=55f48d99-90ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210506-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWY0OGQ5OS05MGFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1AKUnP_kjiyPbr_ye3LeoHXBEZHVAj8I2EWZ_mMPcEQ=)**
Thank you so much for your support. I need Melanie in Washington fighting alongside me, and together we’ll make sure she wins her race.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: Here’s why your support today is so important: I launched Policy is Personal PAC to build progressive power by electing more leaders who will pursue bold policy solutions in Washington. Today, I’m proud to share with you why I’m endorsing Melanie Stansbury in New Mexico’s 1st Congressional District. This is the seat that my friend, Interior Secretary Deb Haaland, formerly held. We need to make sure that another strong progressive holds this seat — and I know Melanie is the person for the job. = Melanie is up against a self-funding millionaire Republican opponent who is trying to buy a Congressional seat. But like me, Melanie knows firsthand what it’s like to struggle to get by. She grew up in a working family in Albuquerque and has dealt with housing and food insecurity. She knows what it’s like to not have health insurance. Melanie has dedicated her career to helping working people get ahead and stay ahead. In the New Mexico House of Representatives, she has been a leader in fighting climate change, alleviating hunger, and tackling the COVID pandemic. If we’re going to send Melanie to Washington to join in our fight, and protect our majority in the House, we need to make sure her campaign has the resources it needs. Republicans are spending more money in the district than they have in years. We can’t let the GOP and their corporate special interest backers buy this seat. = Thank you so much for your support. I need Melanie in Washington fighting alongside me, and together we’ll make sure she wins her race. Onward, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Critical Petition
subject: BREAKING: Trump’s social media ban EXTENDED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Big Tech thinks we’re going to accept their blatant censorship, but that’s where they’re wrong!

**
NEWS ALERT: Facebook announces an indefinite extension on Trump 's ban from the platform**

By extending their ban on President Trump's account, Big Tech has made it clear that they are determined to SILENCE all Conservative voices.

Big Tech thinks we're going to accept their blatant censorship, but that's where they're wrong!

I'm working to stop the silence of Conservative voices once and for all, and I'm hoping I can count on you to join me.

[**If you 're ready to join my efforts to protect our freedom of speech from attacks by the radical Left, please sign my petition condemning Big Tech censorship now!**](https://act.marshablackburn.com/condemn-big-tech-censorship/?utm_campaign=20210506_TY.101551_critical-petition_t1062094-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.101551&utm_content=20210506_breaking-trumps-social-media-ban-extended)

**[**Add My Name**](https://act.marshablackburn.com/condemn-big-tech-censorship/?utm_campaign=20210506_TY.101551_critical-petition_t1062094-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.101551&utm_content=20210506_breaking-trumps-social-media-ban-extended)** ****
---

Gathering as much grassroots support as possible will be the key to sending a clear message to Big Tech, which is why I need your immediate help.

We must safeguard our First Amendment rights and stop the silencing of Conservative voices. What Facebook is doing to President Trump is unacceptable and it's up to us to take action.

President Trump needs our support. I'm afraid this ban extension is just the beginning of future Conservative censorship by Big Tech, [**so please join my efforts to stand up to Big Tech before it 's too late!**](https://act.marshablackburn.com/condemn-big-tech-censorship/?utm_campaign=20210506_TY.101551_critical-petition_t1062094-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.101551&utm_content=20210506_breaking-trumps-social-media-ban-extended)

Thank you,

Marsha Blackburn

**[**Add My Name**](https://act.marshablackburn.com/condemn-big-tech-censorship/?utm_campaign=20210506_TY.101551_critical-petition_t1062094-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.101551&utm_content=20210506_breaking-trumps-social-media-ban-extended)**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I’ve vowed not to accept one cent from corporate PACs
#

I won’t beat around the bush.
Below, I’m going to ask you to chip in to fuel our working people-powered campaign.
[But before I do, I wanted to quickly tell you why this race is so important — and why your support is so critical.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28759051/284250517/-347207331?refcode2=e0e2888d-92ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210506-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGUyODg4ZC05MmFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hyoUrTyYR51Gl853j72RMTPcrD2pZ7Yf7jDKPKgh7E=)
**Every donation we receive — _no matter the amount_ — means we’re that much closer to building the big coalition of working folks we need behind our movement for a $15 minimum wage, confronting the climate crisis, expanding voting rights, canceling student loan debt, and so much more.**
For too long, Washington politicians have deserted working families, leaving them to fend for themselves while they pad their war chests with money from corporate lobbyists and super PACs.
I’ve vowed not to accept one cent from these big-money donors — because I’m not running to represent them. I’m running to represent you.
And I have every faith that this incredible grassroots coalition is going to get me there.
**But it’s going to take a lot of effort from a lot of people chipping in where they can to help us go the distance. That’s why I’m asking for your support.**
[Can you pitch in today? Even $3 goes a long way in a tough race like ours.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28759055/284250544/-347207331?refcode2=e0e2888d-92ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210506-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGUyODg4ZC05MmFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hyoUrTyYR51Gl853j72RMTPcrD2pZ7Yf7jDKPKgh7E=)

Thanks for being a part of this movement,
Malcolm

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Do you want Corporate America deciding your rights?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Once again, "woke" American Corporations are pretending they have the moral high ground and they can tell everyone what's best for this country.
|
---
| | | Friend,

**Once again, "woke" American Corporations are pretending they have the moral high ground and they can tell everyone what's best for this country.** This time, they are focusing their energy on Texas and the state's new election security efforts.

Companies that outsource jobs and partner with Communist China have no place telling Americans how to hold safe and secure elections.

**This is ridiculous. **

These corporations act like they care about people, yet don't hold up to their own standards. They ship good, middle-class jobs to China, a country that uses slave labor and punishes any political speech it does not like. They make broad statements about our American democracy when they're doing business with a country who doesn't even hold elections!

**We need to stand up to these "woke" corporate elites that do not truly care about the everyday American but rather, their own bottom line. _[Can I count on you, Friend, to join me in calling out this hypocrisy and chip in now?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j9uJ5-YmzU5uQCLYPUh2RgT_auKhesCDfr2dhQtp3jgoLFbawWqmvUCq40vjXL05YlC9t9aA1aWVovZ4Yqa5yeXtvdlsSo_FQKeh3V78DeQmVj3b-JAIn7tZyyH_mQqDLb_t6zm4W2kB5dvyGvYYaDhevOI0EoDEik5k1Nq5a_7N3HW6cTD77dcb9kk03K_4fn8TyYUsDL74ENkJzarG2uCxEU052wDv0VctpGMtj5PvxG3EygEDhMSRuUn0rOGoIfI7Lt5HW2Q0AgWmIH1X87f88-tz_z_z_47yfLpXh8VFfoc9aHbNAXCh3tVWKJ9uL0vb91o76roMc9u3bSEOaXb65SrTDha6EF4FXlAuo-P8ES9PXlm4CIfJE2v23tlMJb_AMb4UZjkcCw5801CcD1Nv2aGaqSFLTlW4gNwkQg7jBQOgJWphAcUg8BANVSguR2V_Hv8-6j4Un9yeB2AaQ7IdOnvBUzV7&c=iercEwHPSAKnauP5g-85Xr2Q95avNZSi72bVz26XOUliTutnKq_3AA==&ch=u39eqy26IRtoq2qtCJlZZEqeeFftE4hvzLXvK4Lq3N936gClJIA1NQ== "Can I count on you, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, to join me in calling out this hypocrisy and chip in now? ")_**

name: MCSALLY FOR SENATE
subject: The latest news for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
No matter how hard Chuck Schumer might try and hide it, he's just as radical as Socialist Sanders. And now that Chuck Schumer is Senate Majority Leader, he has all of the resources at his disposal to force this radical agenda on our nation. We can't just sit by and let Chuck Schumer and Bernie Sanders DESTROY our country, which is why we had no choice but to reach out to you today.
**" Bernie Sanders and I agree" \- Chuck Schumer**

No matter how hard Chuck Schumer might try and hide it, _**he 's just as radical as Socialist Sanders.**_

Peter,

Sending a quick e-mail to tell you about what we've got planned for the next 12 days because we hope you will join us:

1) [_**This Saturday, May 8th**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/XTRyb8wSn3ajHVczvKf2tEOguRvCi-UMTCkNRfMWN-0=?t=16&akid=78591%2E6212473%2EtOEDM4), the veterans of Taking the Hill will be participating in the national [_**John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Day.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/XTRyb8wSn3ajHVczvKf2tEOguRvCi-UMTCkNRfMWN-0=?t=16&akid=78591%2E6212473%2EtOEDM4) Together with our friends at groups like Indivisible and the Progressive Change Campaign Committee, we are standing together to urge Congress to pass S1 (the #ForThePeopleAct), HR4 (the #JohnLewisVotingRightsAct), HR51 (the #DCStatehood Act), and filibuster reform in the Senate. [_**You can find your nearest location for action here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/XTRyb8wSn3ajHVczvKf2tEOguRvCi-UMTCkNRfMWN-0=?t=16&akid=78591%2E6212473%2EtOEDM4)

2) To keep and expand our majority of integrity in the Senate, we are hosting our [_**endorsement rally for Senator Tammy Duckworth**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/WySluUwZey-xV8S4sWS65EMvxXm7c7XvxVJZX5ZUILs=) virtually at 7pm on May 18th! If we want to pass S1, HR4, HR51, and a whole host of democracy-strengthening legislation, we need to keep Tammy in the Senate and elect more leaders of integrity to do this work alongside her. [_**Those in attendance**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/WySluUwZey-xV8S4sWS65EMvxXm7c7XvxVJZX5ZUILs=) will get to hear from Senator Duckworth, ask her questions, and help our friend and fellow combat veteran send a message to anti-democracy politicians in Washington. [_**We still have more than 100 tickets available - click this link to get your ticket today!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/WySluUwZey-xV8S4sWS65EMvxXm7c7XvxVJZX5ZUILs=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/Nd7jZM9uhhxyHFWJKk6fpA15Mbryk9yBbsk5CbVPqZE=?utm_source=PCCC) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/WySluUwZey-xV8S4sWS65EMvxXm7c7XvxVJZX5ZUILs=)
See you soon,

**Team Taking the Hill**

Paid for by Taking the Hill
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZRr5SU_kr299z2xOJIbVPHJ4j9LXwgoyZtTvQtzWIKA=/QfXikvhGYdHBx4qBl9o4l1_YMldh0uhNCe-I-UIDFb4=).

Peter,

It’s been a while since we’ve heard from you.

We’re circling back to all of the members of our grassroots community and checking in to make sure we still have the right information for everyone on our list.

**[Is your contact information up to date?](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=b8ae88c0cf9045f6bfe91be97c14e367&_e=qMjDpAjXc7etrWynS3BDTdoQdITd2WLKYduZEw9ot4gxwFYDn5tquw01MDDzyUJRzj-w35yFZCbfel-SirtAb_YGFi-yNYw03YXcRjRK_72eGlAI6QcFLN4ouc6iEQ5l9gtOMEAvzzDdmJnqKChUe7b_VeAsO7cSa-4tNoxjwzcq1HZR7_AX49mOW1eZj9qmiburZRiRdzgJhpqmuqXYSbdm8jPSShsV3uMAkMdR3hp3eNiSx_oi8ndXwL0K0iAkpqRmvRt8huGFX7eYQkhsJURJSx8JKW_st2Rdp76U5fiMn2St8bFsix9Q7U-4OzebT1dA03TzqE7ObydWKiiqDihjiSjregscKj_aQerhEblbHBW873U_YyVCGP16KONVXhksIERKHOeNyHHLjWGOKp04CoCwXWEd4SrQz3PcP2PK3wbdza3DLVUZs2bEeNvdwL9rZMp46O2lhL4zALHUEg%3D%3D)**

We want to keep you up to date on how Mike is working to fix a broken Congress and deliver results for Northwest Wisconsin, but do that, we need to be able to reach you.

It’s never been more important to stay informed about what Mike is doing on Capitol Hill — Republicans have a solid chance to take back the house in 2022, and, Peter, we can’t do it alone, we need your help.

Conservatives like Mike are going to defend America’s timeless principles and apply them to the challenges of the day. They’re going to hold the line against Nancy Pelosi’s partisan agenda and you don’t want to miss out on the most important developments in the coming months.

_Updating or confirming your email address and contact information will ensure that you get updates on what Mike is working on in Congress and opportunities to get involved with our team. _

name: Ralph Northam
subject: It's time to get fired up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GVkiKKQYedXM2ZvjFcq41zaAdayY4HT1JtOm7SE1lWQ=/DNWWlSO9NY87jEpuvNT3offEGMifHzJA2ktehRHJ9AY=?refcode=20210506_RN_TRM)
---
Friend, Here's where we're at:
* **Early voting in the Democratic primary has already started.**
* **The Republican nominating convention starts this weekend.**
* **Tonight, Terry and his primary opponents will debate for the second time.**

There's a TON going on and it's time to get fired up, friend. I know Terry will have our backs on the debate stage tonight, and I want to show him his entire team is standing right there with him. **Terry 's campaign is looking for 1,000 supporters to step up and donate before midnight. Can I count on you to donate now and show you've got Terry's back?** After Democrats were outraged by not one, but **_TWO_** Republican candidates for Governor, we urgently need to help Terry close the gap. Nate Silver's 538 recently said Virginia's Governor's race will be 2021's most competitive. In a race so close, believe me when I tell you that everything we do between now and November will have a huge impact on the future of our Commonwealth. **_[So I am asking you directly - will you pitch in $10 right now to show Terry that you've got his back on this pivotal day? Let's help his team find 1,000 contributions before midnight tonight.](https://act.myngp.com/el/GVkiKKQYedXM2ZvjFcq41zaAdayY4HT1JtOm7SE1lWQ=/DNWWlSO9NY87jEpuvNT3offEGMifHzJA2ktehRHJ9AY=?refcode=20210506_RN_TRM)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GVkiKKQYedXM2ZvjFcq41zaAdayY4HT1JtOm7SE1lWQ=/DNWWlSO9NY87jEpuvNT3offEGMifHzJA2ktehRHJ9AY=?refcode=20210506_RN_TRM) Take care, Ralph

name: Christy Smith
subject: From paid family and medical leave to universal pre-K
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28760270/284254996/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0ZTc2OS05NWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUQxrwE_Qe3BPIDOBptRKoTGfIOdeiSjJ2R05baaWx0=&emci=73aeac5a-bbad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=2524e769-95ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)

Hey Peter,

In President Biden’s first joint address to Congress last month, he unveiled a vision of an American economy that _works for working families._

**This is a big deal.**

From providing for universal preschool education for three- and four-year-olds to mandating 12 weeks of paid family and medical leave, the administration’s **American Families Plan** is a critical step to restarting our economy in the wake of the pandemic.

**Peter: Do you support President Biden’s plan? Tell me below.** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28760279/284255004/-579244529?refcode=em21_210506_AFP-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0ZTc2OS05NWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUQxrwE_Qe3BPIDOBptRKoTGfIOdeiSjJ2R05baaWx0=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28760282/284255011/-1718893268?ms=em21_210506_AFP-s1&refcode=em21_210506_AFP-s1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0ZTc2OS05NWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUQxrwE_Qe3BPIDOBptRKoTGfIOdeiSjJ2R05baaWx0=&emci=73aeac5a-bbad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=2524e769-95ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)
---|---
Workers have to be able to take time off to care for themselves or their loved ones _without_ fearing for their jobs. Parents have to have access to reliable, quality child care. Kids need the best possible education to set them up for success in a competitive job market.

We’ve seen just who has been most affected by the pandemic. Low-income families, the folks already on the margins, bore the brunt -- even though many of those workers served in essential professions. And so many parents, especially moms, had to leave the workforce this last year because they couldn’t both work and care for their children.

The American Families Plan’s funding to **make child care more accessible** will help lift a barrier to employment for so many folks with young kids.

By providing **two years of free community college in addition to two free years of preschool,** our students will begin with the best possible start -- and a more level playing field -- and have access to the education they need in a 21st-century job market.

**12 weeks of paid family and medical leave** will allow workers to care for themselves and their loved ones, without worrying about whether they’ll lose their jobs.

Passing the American Families Plan as soon as possible _just makes sense_ \-- but I want to know your opinion too.

**Do you support enacting these benefits (and so many more!) for working families?** [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28760285/284255014/-579244529?refcode=em21_210506_AFP-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0ZTc2OS05NWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUQxrwE_Qe3BPIDOBptRKoTGfIOdeiSjJ2R05baaWx0=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28760287/284255016/-1718893268?ms=em21_210506_AFP-s1&refcode=em21_210506_AFP-s1&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTI0ZTc2OS05NWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUQxrwE_Qe3BPIDOBptRKoTGfIOdeiSjJ2R05baaWx0=&emci=73aeac5a-bbad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=2524e769-95ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)
---|---
Thanks for sharing your thoughts!

\-- Christy

clean_body: | Hey Peter, In President Biden’s first joint address to Congress last month, he unveiled a vision of an American economy that works for working families. This is a big deal. From providing for universal preschool education for three- and four-year-olds to mandating 12 weeks of paid family and medical leave, the administration’s American Families Plan is a critical step to restarting our economy in the wake of the pandemic. Peter: Do you support President Biden’s plan? Tell me below. | = | ---|--- Workers have to be able to take time off to care for themselves or their loved ones without fearing for their jobs. Parents have to have access to reliable, quality child care. Kids need the best possible education to set them up for success in a competitive job market. We’ve seen just who has been most affected by the pandemic. Low-income families, the folks already on the margins, bore the brunt -- even though many of those workers served in essential professions. And so many parents, especially moms, had to leave the workforce this last year because they couldn’t both work and care for their children. The American Families Plan’s funding to make child care more accessible will help lift a barrier to employment for so many folks with young kids. By providing two years of free community college in addition to two free years of preschool, our students will begin with the best possible start -- and a more level playing field -- and have access to the education they need in a 21st-century job market. 12 weeks of paid family and medical leave will allow workers to care for themselves and their loved ones, without worrying about whether they’ll lose their jobs. Passing the American Families Plan as soon as possible just makes sense \-- but I want to know your opinion too. Do you support enacting these benefits (and so many more!) for working families? = | ---|--- Thanks for sharing your thoughts! \-- Christy = Christy Smith is only soliciting funds that comply with federal campaign finance laws. *

name: Sharif Street
subject: Feeding my neighbors
body:
Because of COVID-19 related health concerns, last year was the first time in over 2 decades I was unable to fast for Ramadan. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28761830/284260271/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQ2ZGE0ZS05OWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaofnWKwyefoUkFwP3BQW4thV4uS82502ZUrgnXyal4=&emci=66d6da4e-99ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=69d6da4e-99ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15053672) | Because of COVID-19 related health concerns, last year was the first time in over 2 decades I was unable to fast for Ramadan. Instead, I provided food for those in need, as suggested by the Quran when one is unable to fast, and watched all the good that resulted. Although I am fasting this year, I decided to continue that fight against food insecurity by committing to provide food for 200 families in Philadelphia each day for the 30 days of Ramadan. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28761831/284260272/900906502?refcode=E8492-20210506-RamadanVolunteering-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQ2ZGE0ZS05OWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaofnWKwyefoUkFwP3BQW4thV4uS82502ZUrgnXyal4=) In doing so, I met so many wonderful volunteers and had deep conversations with our neighbors about COVID-19, jobs, our economy, and the tragic cycle of poverty too many in our communities succumb to. This experience made me even more committed to being the best advocate I can be for my friends and neighbors across our Commonwealth. There are too many folks suffering needlessly because their leaders couldn’t take the decisive action required. _**This is exactly why I launched my exploratory committee into running for Pennsylvania Senate.**_ This race is one of the most important in the country for Democrats hoping to keep the Senate blue, so we need the strongest possible leader to coalesce the people of Pennsylvania to come together and fight for our future. I want to lead that fight. [**However, I first need to tour Pennsylvania from Erie to York; from Philadelphia to Pittsburgh to listen to the people and hear what issues mean the most to them. Will you help me do that by donating $25 towards my exploratory committee today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28761832/284260273/900906502?refcode=E8492-20210506-RamadanVolunteering-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQ2ZGE0ZS05OWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaofnWKwyefoUkFwP3BQW4thV4uS82502ZUrgnXyal4=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28761833/284260274/900906502?refcode=E8492-20210506-RamadanVolunteering-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWQ2ZGE0ZS05OWFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaofnWKwyefoUkFwP3BQW4thV4uS82502ZUrgnXyal4=) Thank you for standing by my side. Yours, Sen. Sharif Street

name: John Kasich
subject: It's time to get serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
The future success of the GOP rests upon the Party's ability to put forward conservative policy ideas to address our nation's largest challenges. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=12a3a8e99b374c07b0a4fdf14544992d&_e=hqWGKWSe-TTl_ds3ougSBKa3Vzvee3L_sOOT1EnYvgLfJKd-be0AyPys1aNlD-90Gp1zvBn1a7PrAzZ785IqDhIa1FBb5aIu_rjRbkxv3b7NQtsJDxbFyCM1DGxfJRZkXVcDoUirzN_C9uRLB9-7FWbjoUZwueE--tMEVu96PWEDmgOg87xG4DOLYJGah0GE8Yecf3o6_amDBXV-oil-wgoyq1Xz2A3wSADkvRrZf7RV__J2xPSPhGOMel5alGzuBi5KT6q4-F1hmuNxYAEAYg%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter, amazingly, I've been one of very few Republicans voicing concerns about the dangers President Biden's $6 billion in proposed spending will do to America's long-term economic health.

It’s an issue that more Republicans need to be talking about, because this unrestrained spending and our disregard for the destructive impact of growing debt poses an increasing risk of fiscal crisis, lower income, higher interest payments and a weakened ability to respond to other urgent problems. **It’s a bomb that could explode at any time if Americans and our elected leaders don’t wake up – and speak up**.

The future success of the GOP rests upon the Party's ability to put forward conservative policy ideas to address our nation's largest challenges. Where are the proposals to cut wasteful spending, rein in the size of government, address rising healthcare costs, the environment and a 21st century immigration plan?
|
---
**The Impact of Biden's Spending:**

It's always helpful to have graphics to help make the point about the dangerous road our country is headed down. At this moment, the national debt is more than $28,000,000,000,000 and that's before factoring in much of the new spending proposals!

**For some historical context, this March 2021 chart from the Congressional Budget Office shows the projection of national debt growth if we continue down this path:**
**And just like taking a loan from your local bank, that debt accrues interest over time. The longer that debt is held, the larger the debt total becomes. This is the definition of runaway spending:**
Every American should be alarmed by this, especially the younger ones. They are the ones that will pay the heavy cost of the spending decisions being made today.
|
---
**My Recent Activities:**

I've been speaking out as often as I can about this runaway spending and the danger that our growing debt poses to our democracy and economy. Anything you can do to help share this message is appreciated!

• My recent CNN interview explaining the dangers of President Biden's $6 trillion in new spending without any government reform to pay for it: [Watch here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=12a3a8e99b374c07b0a4fdf14544992d&_e=hqWGKWSe-TTl_ds3ougSBEl-MfjnGHuwLSu8HM1A0cbKaSqXeEQwWdx-U2U-TbE8RJkjjRNrnVprTl1xLxTTxyvOx6qnBdSrG0lld0mJLBYhbJZqK4WSnjCOyiBW4TB2d3Sdi7-ORs3Z0pQT_YVW-4jMCSdBkZ9aX_xoQ0QfV15CSapmb6ABKtzc5__MExqf2FAYjbifXHHA-h5Ib-AbELdyUPsqdWDPQIg2TsXhT5_a-qyfJlrrLFYwPhsPn7TYu2Jl7zF-Y_7g9owGKZYkpg%3D%3D).

• My comments about how absurd it is that the GOP is fighting within rather than offering Americans a conservative/hopeful message about our country's greatest challenges: [Watch here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=12a3a8e99b374c07b0a4fdf14544992d&_e=hqWGKWSe-TTl_ds3ougSBDOsySpFdOggkNKsF7FOWuZsuVXbjfOlL46eYUiGORnNxs67cGKNd0bgSkFMggBrRNeGDzBuv5uw2F2xOeFlEZPwhEnLQnVONThXGMo8wnYdnb1qJdJWj8QDa-dLX-xb8bgR_fWCY9vvbdxkC4-SW9j3vDUwxFrQlebjuyX3vPm1rucHQScbvYXx-18PbWIGBQlUklVu76I2Sts2xnpSNbvK1uu3RnLHXZ9pfE3bYXOl-mYz0FLJgOzzKAgDuaSl-w%3D%3D).

• Why I think the GOP attempt to remove Cong. Liz Cheney from her leadership position will backfire: [Watch here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=12a3a8e99b374c07b0a4fdf14544992d&_e=hqWGKWSe-TTl_ds3ougSBHYIr3xrTETq26RQx-dHbsgJ-eww-h0cyjg4gRA70LSU-RqfPqn540g1K4ODwxVxB2F24VpMmgEBWq8F7KZZ67JOqWoGPJug_foEShmK6ytyJ2gsETvRJspF1ydY6aw7wSJ1CrDSLq1oYPyHYCBqC8RtyLeJQEnghnOgYHlkU-Ys_U_ro0etF9LbRMiTROHOA12nXYOQ1sTTfODngrUypxKHPFduS2PbRpDXgY9bDIRMkZQbMXTRkWIm3wGhCkO_xg%3D%3D).

• I discussed the state of America's politics on New Hampshire Talk Radio: [Listen here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=12a3a8e99b374c07b0a4fdf14544992d&_e=hqWGKWSe-TTl_ds3ougSBNo2yls4qMbHsEg5oMkU_i6Io-6MOTuaPAp5tvcySk2z1DPHofyDsH59EvFNvPYT9rJYNmI6fOqMdPcDbG1dOXtvxRpRxai-KDyLm6kbOhuNZ9puGPyoMQEa7RYMrouDql_oI9zNXnvvYT-Pd2VQHDrzmCohlGzjggBotaXtRicjRIeSGM7lYcZCD2MEudZjVA95CB6ST_Ro9lBct4HM4fnVuhStD-Q_v95ZJU2gB5Joa_2rzcM60Sk6W45DXrWSUP5QhhKCT2fKA4LpDeeFVjkHpxHYBKenAY3198TPUlMPs-mk96i1IkDkLSoZRKbTWB0p-d4Rzp6Fi3ixZngSsh9TnEF1mkqGmPuy2qMwwyEiZqtBNKR-LBSuEj5Gfsr9HQ%3D%3D).

• I've worked to support the efforts of [FixUSNow.org](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=12a3a8e99b374c07b0a4fdf14544992d&_e=hqWGKWSe-TTl_ds3ougSBNAc1oeh0tsa8XYU7CWhbmzA-qO9wrxo_Zp9_xGT6sz5Zps4AaqtIuta0HcL6HKpO6Avq8BXBV2LL2z8f_G0zq9CcmPbRbBlX6-SKyBVUoyTnBj1V39UDADZ3-OKDm0Vx4B5VxB-OroseK_wl9vk1xWo7bnHywjCFIpsvDOPbeDAuHYGpbxNpLrj3FINW2-HPkykn0ZfkogPz9n72TVd8TAfAhrPRzSgVkmkAVwrlbWiB91Cb3iGXDS9p1FQBSTCNT-ZsMfHPeqDmclvqLdjrag%3D) to drive policy ideas to the forefront of our political discussion.

• My recent op-ed about the amount of non-Covid related spending in the $1.9 trillion bill that was jammed through Congress: [Read here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=12a3a8e99b374c07b0a4fdf14544992d&_e=hqWGKWSe-TTl_ds3ougSBFwGsgTw9kFuPXlU0YsBY4p-HvYQtdFWZ4AbMRQZ9emLM7Vr6GUbifes4FpmyJrrpHBbbc79gd__p8dAWRsYZTNj0dNTxNOSm-spxTlK8HjB67An-NxhrjCa9cMc9ffNwgJqAhTC2DgMXkJPzZu-AwKGnuy3k285l8lc609BT9SntzwCg-4k4hl5SqkD1HyU_FQzwntt18pAaQKoJjCto36Asuo9-UFU5C-OvMv_tVjbT7Y2XK02FGohfJaswn4gJu7Yy5j02ekjAb9kYTSkWFXBbRqPTV6StOqpQh-o8HMlsSbTHJVa3AK4HmBV9ZkcN7Y8Bxd6McXTz6LzCgHjEXMwLmiIPhKXzocCY1DIhSMF3A-TK89HmvnDjTsjpar8Mg%3D%3D).

clean_body: The future success of the GOP rests upon the Party's ability to put forward conservative policy ideas to address our nation's largest challenges. | | Peter, amazingly, I've been one of very few Republicans voicing concerns about the dangers President Biden's $6 billion in proposed spending will do to America's long-term economic health. It’s an issue that more Republicans need to be talking about, because this unrestrained spending and our disregard for the destructive impact of growing debt poses an increasing risk of fiscal crisis, lower income, higher interest payments and a weakened ability to respond to other urgent problems. It’s a bomb that could explode at any time if Americans and our elected leaders don’t wake up – and speak up. The future success of the GOP rests upon the Party's ability to put forward conservative policy ideas to address our nation's largest challenges. Where are the proposals to cut wasteful spending, rein in the size of government, address rising healthcare costs, the environment and a 21st century immigration plan? | The Impact of Biden's Spending: It's always helpful to have graphics to help make the point about the dangerous road our country is headed down. At this moment, the national debt is more than $28,000,000,000,000 and that's before factoring in much of the new spending proposals! For some historical context, this March 2021 chart from the Congressional Budget Office shows the projection of national debt growth if we continue down this path: And just like taking a loan from your local bank, that debt accrues interest over time. The longer that debt is held, the larger the debt total becomes. This is the definition of runaway spending: Every American should be alarmed by this, especially the younger ones. They are the ones that will pay the heavy cost of the spending decisions being made today. | My Recent Activities: I've been speaking out as often as I can about this runaway spending and the danger that our growing debt poses to our democracy and economy. Anything you can do to help share this message is appreciated! • My recent CNN interview explaining the dangers of President Biden's $6 trillion in new spending without any government reform to pay for it: . • My comments about how absurd it is that the GOP is fighting within rather than offering Americans a conservative/hopeful message about our country's greatest challenges: . • Why I think the GOP attempt to remove Cong. Liz Cheney from her leadership position will backfire: . • I discussed the state of America's politics on New Hampshire Talk Radio: . • I've worked to support the efforts of to drive policy ideas to the forefront of our political discussion. • My recent op-ed about the amount of non-Covid related spending in the $1.9 trillion bill that was jammed through Congress: . | Peter, I'm going to keep up this fight to get the Republican Party focused back on offering better ideas and policy solutions. This is the pathway to retaking the U.S. House in 2022 and paving the way to the White House again. . Thanks for all that you're doing! -John | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Facebook Censors Trump, but Encourages Border Crisis!
body:
Big tech needs to be held accountable
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gf6ndKAIC3ll7M6UFBFcrFQClUhvVoKcoAF89b2qXanQUGrd1YZm2pAmoMdBYjHJpP56XKvbVQw6Bc4jCSWOf9CQERO6kQ2cm5KRYU7tSSXtcRtlAPd1yVb1N770dY7OeP1S3KNBy9XKx9AzXJw9itltI_YxzwoM7rDfsv_06BRCffAtwSmqKw==&c=E6uzgMDmZhDpl5I-qeO73855ONWhIkSvd8PnABrfsm3m9CFvAS-v5A==&ch=XAi5u7lB3KZyIa2bFMr3h-TmfYgPQXYRyL9sXRV3PGeqEt9Hksxtfw==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
Big Tech has been cracking down on free speech - just recently the Facebook oversight board upheld their censorship of President Trump in yet another display of their total bias against conservatives!
---
| | | [STAND UP TO BIG TECH CENSORSHIP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gf6ndKAIC3ll7M6UFBFcrFQClUhvVoKcoAF89b2qXanQUGrd1YZm2pAmoMdBYjHJpP56XKvbVQw6Bc4jCSWOf9CQERO6kQ2cm5KRYU7tSSXtcRtlAPd1yVb1N770dY7OeP1S3KNBy9XKx9AzXJw9itltI_YxzwoM7rDfsv_06BRCffAtwSmqKw==&c=E6uzgMDmZhDpl5I-qeO73855ONWhIkSvd8PnABrfsm3m9CFvAS-v5A==&ch=XAi5u7lB3KZyIa2bFMr3h-TmfYgPQXYRyL9sXRV3PGeqEt9Hksxtfw==&jrc=1)
---
| These tech tyrants will ban you, stop you from earning a living, and suppress your speech unless you agree with their worldview... and the other day, I found out just where these priorities lie.
At the same time that they were censoring Trump yet again, Facebook had advertisements on their platform for human smuggling across our Southern Border!
After personally finding these ads with a simple search, I had to write a letter to Facebook to get them to IMMEDIATELY address their role in the raging border crisis. Take a look:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gf6ndKAIC3ll7M6UFBFcrFQClUhvVoKcoAF89b2qXanQUGrd1YZm2pAmoMdBYjHJ4WIkjcQPCDKrmkbCFz-IfCM4jHq-JkffK4-_PFmYfOPryeQzgFfolyirZlqDJaBGLIf2YH0uHukNAgVX5e2gcvnsb37cSRHyu_SoJ1BQb2tH9Mmbj_fS-OPne66IJJ5twO0JMSlmDb2ivWakivvGpSLgTQ0mRB1aPWLmr8rYT8NBYIQlENyI9g==&c=E6uzgMDmZhDpl5I-qeO73855ONWhIkSvd8PnABrfsm3m9CFvAS-v5A==&ch=XAi5u7lB3KZyIa2bFMr3h-TmfYgPQXYRyL9sXRV3PGeqEt9Hksxtfw==&jrc=1)
---
| When I went to McAllen, Texas recently to see the Biden Border Crisis firsthand, Border Patrol agents informed me that human smugglers and even cartels use Facebook to advertise and arrange payments for their illicit services.
Facebook will take away your freedom of speech while at the same time making your country more dangerous!
Here's a thought: instead of censoring conservatives, how about, we take on the cartels?
If you agree with this simple concept, [join me in standing up to the despicable, America Last priorities of Big Tech before they make the border crisis even worse!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Gf6ndKAIC3ll7M6UFBFcrFQClUhvVoKcoAF89b2qXanQUGrd1YZm2pAmoMdBYjHJpP56XKvbVQw6Bc4jCSWOf9CQERO6kQ2cm5KRYU7tSSXtcRtlAPd1yVb1N770dY7OeP1S3KNBy9XKx9AzXJw9itltI_YxzwoM7rDfsv_06BRCffAtwSmqKw==&c=E6uzgMDmZhDpl5I-qeO73855ONWhIkSvd8PnABrfsm3m9CFvAS-v5A==&ch=XAi5u7lB3KZyIa2bFMr3h-TmfYgPQXYRyL9sXRV3PGeqEt9Hksxtfw==&jrc=1)

name: Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)
subject: Audit Update: Democrats Gone Wild
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Arizona Democrat Party
body:
We can't let them tell a false story here. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85c9ac1e984343b68f99effcd71354ec&_e=L6VdB6Q4_ZgSx-wTjzG0aahpfor9gCowLCuzCYu3QPmUo2Er4Ud08iwlQo3vdt1LYONboRr8uzmH_Y83r6d_9U6Nae9MdPTFc43wl-t_z6wf6eEjKS_fG2XsG449guH82u3y2DrIpY81oEJyE1ftktzezgnz2-ac-NR94C6-9horrlHPNuPRQ-F83tCH5OVzPX216gtfSeRYUY0vU0hMGFbx01gCVGNx-gQRBrdA28Zorlnf7zwkOq6RBqk1VaclqJRu-p17kSr3md3Bwltdeh1AVkFjmVP2ZOxYoOmGddzH3tEh8mgG6opFDrGIm9Az) Dear Friend-- We knew, in the Arizona Senate, that the Dems didn't want independent parties looking at the Maricopa ballots.

We didn't know they would go THIS FAR to stop the truth from being told.

I am Senator WendyRogers, the pro-Trump firebrand Arizona State Senator who was the deciding vote cast for election integrity in Arizona!** [Can you help me stand strong for election integrity?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85c9ac1e984343b68f99effcd71354ec&_e=L6VdB6Q4_ZgSx-wTjzG0aahpfor9gCowLCuzCYu3QPmUo2Er4Ud08iwlQo3vdt1LYONboRr8uzmH_Y83r6d_9Rg-_j_NGFeBc16Tt_nAXa7MvNljBlJdmTTTg8rtl88LjUORHKjSrWiaTDw6NQPNrQ-NBKCfhI6u-_gfIlmrW5qqj1bvPW1-tPlgw8UiBzA_201qon5f03-qlQnPA2n_yqVk4s_7hiK40l3Cxyi-Mg3XvOfPR4COqZt51cpTBevDDqz2ozxG5w_oVXnJuss4k41abXnmY36sGtxx4Jy_i2ecXQRfd3StEvmo1PLcyYYr)** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85c9ac1e984343b68f99effcd71354ec&_e=L6VdB6Q4_ZgSx-wTjzG0aahpfor9gCowLCuzCYu3QPmUo2Er4Ud08iwlQo3vdt1LYONboRr8uzmH_Y83r6d_9deYpKVRxxYlwjVKTFsslHxfltnzxsUVFVrF9ChyHKPG-0MHyV0XPEK18Sen_KZ3z3dn0z6FJr39sEiP22f2BVUOkydO9MEww8zCTI9z2q0N2pc-P8aFGkDStD7jidt8M8CqXOKG4CpJZ3VPr0LQA45XgLe7cW8OaZ6sAs8R-tOQpYs637MqxP1D1COQ57C0Zp7PTssslDtwm1qiW0NYIf7Z9ZqvDg-YS-Y5YzVfgm6R) It amazes me that the liberal media have such a problem with this. **So far, the following people are the only ones to have looked at the ballots:** 1\. The Soros-aligned Democrat Secretary of State, who actively encourages illegal aliens to vote in Federal elections (it's on her website!).

2\. The Democrat-controlled Board of Supervisors of Maricopa County, who surprisingly said that their count had no flaws.

In the Arizona Senate, our duty is oversight. We subpoenaed the ballots, and Maricopa fought us in court and lost. Then they tried to ignore the judge's order, and lost again. Then they tried to throw up administrative roadblocks, only to have them removed.

_Now, the venue is set, the neutral third party counters are engaged, and the counting has begun. _

But not before the Arizona Democrats filed for a Temporary Restraining Order to stop the audit. This request was heard by a judge, but he demanded a $1 million bond, paid for by the Arizona Democrat Party. They refused, and the count went on.

**I think it's telling that when the judge made them _"put up or shut up"_ , they shut up quick!**

Now, we don't have just anyone doing this count for us. We hired a former Arizona Secretary of State, Ken Bennett, as our liason for the audit. Ken is not a Soros employee, so we have some confidence in him.

**President Trump also weighed in on this matter.** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85c9ac1e984343b68f99effcd71354ec&_e=L6VdB6Q4_ZgSx-wTjzG0aahpfor9gCowLCuzCYu3QPmUo2Er4Ud08iwlQo3vdt1LYONboRr8uzmH_Y83r6d_9fU7_BRXOv6viIWyvoXJt30FbDGUPEpUv3TIV4xkrzobwQP8Y9oM_IBAvyr6AvyrkUfENjRTobxZrL2qJuIyflRqIe8VcE8gx2gC4bf211t_WewiMQvBRIq_18-dBeAyE6kjvBmGIipq-FrtzEVCaiBslshZseVicYGaWMn7c4qigoRozE30ZISUlca-6g2Tpa0wNiXUa5hzST-dfyrDqLwj4azJmkxEOcgqVE2fjBSo) The Democrats have tried everything to stop an independent review of these ballots. They sued us. They sued us again. They whine to their allies in the press. They even had a trespasser break into the venue to disrupt things.

**But we are being professional about this. We have followed the law, and this will help us draft legislation to prevent these issues in the future.**

_I care about election integrity very deeply, and I am proud to have been the deciding vote for this audit to proceed_! I am the deciding vote on the action taken by the Arizona Senate to ensure our elections are more secure going forward.

The left-wing press is attacking us- even national press and UK press! They have a big microphone, and they are spreading lie after lie about the audit, fed to them by their allies in the Democrat party.

**We can't let them tell a false story here.**

[**Will you stand with me for election integrity? Help us tell the TRUTH about the audit and about the 2020 vote, conducted and counted by liberal Democrats!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85c9ac1e984343b68f99effcd71354ec&_e=L6VdB6Q4_ZgSx-wTjzG0aahpfor9gCowLCuzCYu3QPmUo2Er4Ud08iwlQo3vdt1LYONboRr8uzmH_Y83r6d_9QOfOaMHn_giDaly3X8ZNhvDJwJADviejbINBuJnbShH6KXCcEHOg-QDvbE8l7fLUKRRdaWzyd2qbPtOo_8TSQxk9KZUfhGhYyGTDwwDdR-4QzSGfYQFMQTIeazqrbsLVRriqz-_v9zE4RQF_YTcfvFPwqM7or32jcJhoo-Ej3D9zUDLthIVro-e9jTGD-fxvnSOm-j0ntGzfKrlEx4JrsuiAGOylW_phX1Nfdb5qrOx)

**I promised to fight for you.** **I promised to fight for election integrity, and I have kept my promises.** **Help me finish this job and defend the truth!**

**[Help me send a message](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85c9ac1e984343b68f99effcd71354ec&_e=L6VdB6Q4_ZgSx-wTjzG0aahpfor9gCowLCuzCYu3QPmUo2Er4Ud08iwlQo3vdt1LYONboRr8uzmH_Y83r6d_9TV5dck11OzzbVCPpoJHMmgBl2bbVO0RSUNvTkaJEMiWIh-VN95vc3rBVVcdNmpnJs1C3juCJ_dbgRrckChLZj3oX8HHQyh28vV5lBwUGLLZEoZaWoj9PuE_L297Ds0j65V3nvKDea32uYyaM5O59tLe2pQ5Lbn4dc8eFiH1z_xaVAGS386l5cMSCJfCaAa-DQz_oLS5GON0xzRRotBlHyEYAYPn40f8WRLsh_zxTpP6)** \- Arizona won't be stolen by Soros! Thank you and God bless you. Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret) Arizona State Senator Arizona's 6th Legislative District [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85c9ac1e984343b68f99effcd71354ec&_e=L6VdB6Q4_ZgSx-wTjzG0aahpfor9gCowLCuzCYu3QPmUo2Er4Ud08iwlQo3vdt1LYONboRr8uzmH_Y83r6d_9V5cCs85a7ysqkJuAhYnOTxPmnRqxaiSQ4e3INGa5PakCGznshxcXvnftN6ZU57Rx1kp3A3woc9hBRfkyVV6Y5o9RPWFuiFQitU91ml130okbCiS2uTK0eRiiolpKWHna7fgUsCwj6pgdpxoO43UsBPImgYcOCKLzE-phkODXpx9WRqFfrTLhYacnUXNuwfjMnzuGMQLymq15_R7p9NTjznY2QvNFapOgcZSsP1pCSdH)

**PAID FOR BY ****WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE**

| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots who are fearless in taking on the corrupt, big government Swamp, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=0612f811ee&e=ba6e67b849)!

**If you saw Biden's disastrous speech last night, you know what's about to happen: a year and a half of the American People getting the short end from the Democrats, hoping the Republicans in the Senate hold firm and Joe Manchin keeps resisting. **

I think the NY Post summed it up perfectly:

_President Biden’s speech Wednesday night failed on all counts: It didn’t sell his latest spending plan, it didn’t sell his larger agenda — and, worst of all, it didn’t sell him._

_It seemed like he was just skipping whole paragraphs and even pages. You could see even Democrats wincing above their masks.

He tossed in a few blatant whoppers, like his repeated claims that economists “left, right and center” agree his program will work just as he says._

_Mixed in were lies about how he’d solved the border crisis as vice president, plus vague waves at a foreign policy (and trade: He talks “buy American” as much as the guy he replaced) and some noise about being tough militarily when the Defense Department is about the only federal agency he doesn’t want to spend more on.

The speech was packed with hoary clichés and empty rhetoric about unity, spiced with blather about “white supremacy” and “systemic racism” even as he was insisting (correctly) that nearly all cops only work hard to protect the public._

So there you have it: a mix of lies, delusions, and outrageous spending we can't afford and won't pass.

Oh, and calling us all racists. Sen. Scott was right to call out that nonsense.

clean_body: He is a damn Communist! | | | | | Hi Peter, My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots who are fearless in taking on the corrupt, big government Swamp, ! If you saw Biden's disastrous speech last night, you know what's about to happen: a year and a half of the American People getting the short end from the Democrats, hoping the Republicans in the Senate hold firm and Joe Manchin keeps resisting. I think the NY Post summed it up perfectly: President Biden’s speech Wednesday night failed on all counts: It didn’t sell his latest spending plan, it didn’t sell his larger agenda — and, worst of all, it didn’t sell him. It seemed like he was just skipping whole paragraphs and even pages. You could see even Democrats wincing above their masks. He tossed in a few blatant whoppers, like his repeated claims that economists “left, right and center” agree his program will work just as he says. Mixed in were lies about how he’d solved the border crisis as vice president, plus vague waves at a foreign policy (and trade: He talks “buy American” as much as the guy he replaced) and some noise about being tough militarily when the Defense Department is about the only federal agency he doesn’t want to spend more on. The speech was packed with hoary clichés and empty rhetoric about unity, spiced with blather about “white supremacy” and “systemic racism” even as he was insisting (correctly) that nearly all cops only work hard to protect the public. So there you have it: a mix of lies, delusions, and outrageous spending we can't afford and won't pass. Oh, and calling us all racists. Sen. Scott was right to call out that nonsense. | | But then, that's what the Swamp is.... a bunch of greedy, unscrupulous people who don't care about us, look down on us, and want to destroy the country. My favorite part was when he described the January 6 protests as "the greatest threat to our democracy since the Civil War". I mean, really? Since the Civil War: -4 presidents were assassinated while in office -A Bernie Bro shot up several Republican Congressmen in 2017 at a baseball practice -Pearl Harbor was attacked by the Japanese -The Constitution was amended to allow for Federal income tax. -Islamic terrorists attacked the Twin Towers and Pentagon on 9/11. Sorry Senile Joe, but there is no universe where January 6- where Duck Dynasty and a guy in a buffalo bikini strolled through Congress- is worse than any of that. RINO Liz Cheney has been peddling that lie a lot too- and the Never-Trumper Congresswoman literally threw people out of the way to run up and fist bump with her fellow leftist, Biden. We need to get rid of the leftists of BOTH parties, including Biden, Pelosi, and Cheney! | | Picture a Congress without Pelosi or Harris. Picture a White House without Biden. We can achieve this! The Swamp is full of Communists and traitors! Don't let the Swamp beat good candidates. Let's make America strong again. We are always strongest when we FIGHT Communists, not when we elect them! Respectfully, | | Christopher Ekstrom Businessman America First Donor P.S. The chance to get true patriots like Mo into office is rare! | "DONATE NOW!" | | | | Copyright © 2021 Drain the DC Swamp PAC, All rights reserved. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Thank you for being a part of this journey with me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We're creating the future we want to see, together.
#
Peter,
Welcome to our people-first movement to build the future we want to see.
Together, we're fighting for the progressive values we share: Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and dignity for all immigrants. And with Democratic control of the House, the Senate, and the White House — these fights are within reach more than ever.
These battles won't be won overnight, but what matters is that we work hard and organize together to get us a little closer each day. **And with supporters like you, I'm confident we will win.**
[**Now, if you have a moment, will you let me know what issues matter most to you? The more I learn about your concerns, the better advocate I can be for you in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome-survey/?source=em-20210506&t=1&akid=266%2E420207%2E1msW5J)
Once again, thank you for being a part of this. You'll be hearing more from us soon!
In solidarity,
Pramila

subject: The Senate Republican campaign arm just targeted us!

body:
#

**_Breaking News:_ Senate Republican campaign arm targets Mark Kelly in new ad
_Chip in today to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210506-1-15&t=1&refcode2=567_6688874_Kl0k1c&akid=567%2E6688874%2EKl0k1c)**
* * *
Friends —
National Republicans just made it clear that defeating us and taking back this seat is a top priority in 2022. They know our majority in the Senate is razor thin and all eyes are on Arizona to see if we can hold this seat.
That’s why last week they launched tens of thousands of dollars in ads targeting us, a sign that Arizona is one of the most important battlegrounds in the 2022 midterm elections.
So it’s clear now that we MUST do everything we can to defend Mark and hold this seat _and_ our Senate majority.
**Going up against the deep pockets of the National GOP isn’t going to be easy. It’s going to be a major undertaking. Which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210506-1-15&t=2&refcode2=567_6688874_Kl0k1c&akid=567%2E6688874%2EKl0k1c)

Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever National Republicans decide to throw at us as we prepare to run again in 2022.
Thank you in advance for chipping in,
Team Kelly

clean_body: Breaking News: Senate Republican campaign arm targets Mark Kelly in new ad Chip in today to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate! Friends — National Republicans just made it clear that defeating us and taking back this seat is a top priority in 2022. They know our majority in the Senate is razor thin and all eyes are on Arizona to see if we can hold this seat. That’s why last week they launched tens of thousands of dollars in ads targeting us, a sign that Arizona is one of the most important battlegrounds in the 2022 midterm elections. So it’s clear now that we MUST do everything we can to defend Mark and hold this seat and our Senate majority. Going up against the deep pockets of the National GOP isn’t going to be easy. It’s going to be a major undertaking. Which is why we have to ask: Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever National Republicans decide to throw at us as we prepare to run again in 2022. Thank you in advance for chipping in, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Florida is getting it done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Check this out |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=572ad2da14&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9eca1054b6&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by hard leftist Darren Soto. **

Governor DeSantis is showing the country how to live freely- and how to govern a free people. He isn't accepting the woke leftist garbage that Biden is shoving down everyone's throats.

All of us have been complaining for years about the dictatorial censorship by Big Tech.

These companies are run by far-Left extremists who (like Soviet Russia) think that no one needs free speech, and are arrogant enough to think that censoring politicians- ONLY CONSERVATIVES- is within their power.

They banned President Trump, while he was still President. They have banned countless conservative candidates who dared speak that which the Tech Lords disagreed with.

As Twitter and Facebook became more and more Orwellian, many of us cried out for leadership.

Governor DeSantis obliged.

_The Florida House and Senate voted this week to pass legislation that would prohibit social media companies from banning politicians.

Fines for social media companies that try to ban politicians from their platforms could add up to $250,000 a day for statewide politicians and $25,000 a day for other elected officials, the Sun-Sentinel reported.

The bill, which still allows for politicians to be suspended for two weeks and for individual posts to be taken down if they violate the company’s policies, is now headed to Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis._

Every time they stifle free speech and debate against their political opponents, make it hurt until shareholders change leadership. That is how you protect the rights of Floridians- AND Americans.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=63954fbf66&e=afa21b7626)
---
| I agree with Townhall:

_The woke zealots who run these companies are taking cues from the liberal media and the Democratic Party to censor conservatives. It’s just another day of conservative America facing Goliath._And we need to start getting slingshots ready. __

Every single day, more of our freedoms are getting taken by the woke crazies of the Biden Administration. Communists in Federal government, Communists in Big Tech, Communists teaching our schools.

_Governor DeSantis of Florida is fighting them all- and with incredible efficiency._

**But we need to fix Congress- and elect Congressmen who will put into code, the solutions Gov. DeSantis is installing in Florida.**

Until the Democrats prove they accept the Constitution and protect the lives and property of innocent people, we must fight them with everything we have and in every single day.

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. But this near loss has not put the fear of God into him yet- **so this year I'm back to finish the job!**

I am an America First patriot, I am a Christian, and I will vote with the Constitution. I will roll back the tyranny of Big Government, Big Tech, and Big Teacher Unions.

If you're like me, you value your freedom. If you're like me, you want to fight for it! [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c3264a7097&e=afa21b7626)

[Can I count on you for your maximum donation to elect a fighter and a patriot to Congress?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7b2cd51bed&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and knock down Big Tyranny!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1bab7eeaaf&e=afa21b7626)

**_Let's get this done!_**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4439860ebf&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ac99da69e7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4f7b064ed8&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._

| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=f1fcf57d0b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=f1fcf57d0b).

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9576681/224717773/188340/14/).
