Hello there, **Last week, the Democratic Party of New Mexico elected Jessica Velasquez to lead the party through the upcoming election cycle.** I couldn’t be more excited about this news. I know Jessica will help our party grow and bring even more progressive victories to New Mexico. This change couldn’t come at a more critical time for our state. With the election to fill New Mexico’s first congressional district just around the corner, we need to make sure Jessica and her team have what it takes to hit the ground running. I’ve been able to raise over $17,500 for our state party so far this year. Now I need your help. **Listen, can you split a contribution between our campaign and the Democratic Party of New Mexico today? We have the opportunity to elect Democrats in every community in New Mexico and bring about the change our state truly needs — from creating good-paying green jobs, to expanding access to healthcare, to protecting our public lands, and more.
**Our wins next year depend on the groundwork we lay now. That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and the Democratic Party of New Mexico. Any amount you can give now will help us win critical elections and make meaningful progress for folks across our state.**

clean_body: Hello there, Last week, the Democratic Party of New Mexico elected Jessica Velasquez to lead the party through the upcoming election cycle. I couldn’t be more excited about this news. I know Jessica will help our party grow and bring even more progressive victories to New Mexico. This change couldn’t come at a more critical time for our state. With the election to fill New Mexico’s first congressional district just around the corner, we need to make sure Jessica and her team have what it takes to hit the ground running. I’ve been able to raise over $17,500 for our state party so far this year. Now I need your help. Listen, can you split a contribution between our campaign and the Democratic Party of New Mexico today? Our progress depends on keeping every seat blue. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = And our work won’t stop in June. With municipal elections this fall to fill multiple important statewide offices, all three congressional districts, and every state house seat next year — the stakes are high. We have the opportunity to elect Democrats in every community in New Mexico and bring about the change our state truly needs — from creating good-paying green jobs, to expanding access to healthcare, to protecting our public lands, and more. Our wins next year depend on the groundwork we lay now. That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and the Democratic Party of New Mexico. Any amount you can give now will help us win critical elections and make meaningful progress for folks across our state. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Together, we can ensure that New Mexico is the best place in our country to live, work, and raise a family. Thank you for doing your part for our great state. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. body:

name: Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager
subject: FWD: 76,000 inmates to be released starting Saturday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
FWD: This is a blatant assault on public safety in California. Read more >>
Peter, Did you see John’s email earlier about Gavin Newsom releasing violent criminals into our streets in California? I’m forwarding it below just in case you missed it, because this is a TOP priority right now! Our kids deserve safe neighborhoods to play in, and families shouldn’t have to worry about violent criminals on the streets. **It's one more example of how Gavin Newsom has FAILED Californians, and one of the most atrocious yet!** It is crucial that we vote Gavin out of office in the upcoming recall election, and vote in Kevin Faulconer. Not only is Kevin a proven leader in California, he’s a father who deeply understands the importance of keeping our children safe. [**Please RUSH a donation now to make sure we get Gavin out of office ASAP. >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c67808d8754b9ea/d9ddfe0100436c0ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) The future of the Golden State depends on it! Thanks for your help,
Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager | |
---
To: All Supporters
From: John Burke
Date: Tuesday, May 4, 2021 10:11 a.m.
Subject: 76,000 inmates to be released starting Saturday
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c67808d8754b9ea/126cc89f0aa7ceb9c3d6b838967d376c/34943)
Friend,

Starting this Saturday, Gavin Newsom is allowing 76,000 inmates to be released back into California — including many who have committed violent crimes!

This is a blatant assault on public safety in the Golden State, and Kevin Faulconer is deeply worried as a citizen and especially as a father.

Our children won't be safe riding their bikes in their own neighborhoods, our homes won't be safe from burglary, and murderers will be free to roam our streets.

**Is this what Gavin Newsom calls leadership? It’s what we call dangerous and reckless decision-making, and it’s putting all law-abiding Californians at risk. We owe it to our families to change course now!**

That’s why Kevin is leading the movement to recall Gavin Newsom this year in a special election. It is becoming increasingly important every single day that we get Gavin out of office, and get someone in who will actually put the safety of California families above partisan power plays.

Californians want an early release for Gavin Newsom, not violent criminals.

**Please help spread the word about Gavin Newsom’s latest attack on our safety by[sharing this article](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c67808d8754b9ea/6823f5e9703091ddc3d6b838967d376c/34943) about the planned inmate release:**
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c67808d8754b9ea/e6a54b90aded7638c3d6b838967d376c/34943)
This is NO way to run a state. **Californians want an early release for Gavin Newsom, not violent criminals.** It’s time for real leadership in California. It’s time to get Gavin Newsom OUT, and Kevin Faulconer IN!

Thanks for helping spread the word,
John Burke, Communications Director
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c67808d8754b9ea/9fee65490c704832c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c67808d8754b9ea/a13427657d6d502fc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c67808d8754b9ea/43ce5dd121d3bb63c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/9c67808d8754b9ea/d7692c48ff39257cc3d6b838967d376c/34943)
---|---|---|---
Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022

This email was sent by: Kevin Faulconer
P.O. Box 6871, San Diego, CA, 92166
[Profile Center](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476&c=34943&jid=9c67808d8754b9ea)
[Unsubscribe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476&c=34943&jid=9c67808d8754b9ea)
[View as webpage](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/9c67808d8754b9ea/34943/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I don't take this lightly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
I'm about to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign but first, I hope you'll allow me to explain why your support now matters so much.
I don't make this request lightly -- I ask because of what we're up against.
In 2016, dark money and Republican special interest groups poured in millions of dollars (record amounts of money!) to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. When the dust settled,**I won by just 1,017 votes.**
Our fundraising has taken a nosedive in May, and I don't want to think about what happens if we don't bounce back. [**I have to ask: Will you please give $3 or more right now to protect New Hampshire 's vulnerable Senate seat and our Democratic majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc83a/2a380d31/26495a92/f00c7b/2979243253/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2hfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc83a/2a380d31/26495a92/f00c64/2979243253/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2hfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc83a/2a380d31/26495a92/f00c65/2979243253/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2hfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc83a/2a380d31/26495a92/f00c66/2979243253/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2hfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc83a/2a380d31/26495a92/f00c7b/2979243253/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2hfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Now, with Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans are doing whatever they can to flip this seat. Strong early fundraising is the only way to lock in -- and fund -- our strategy to fend off GOP attacks. But with New Hampshire's expensive media markets and polls showing us down, **we need to build up our fundraising ASAP.**
I truly believe that together we can make a difference. That's why I first ran for office -- to advocate for families and kids who weren't getting the support they needed. And that's the spirit I'm asking you to embrace today. [**If you 're able, please make a critically important donation right now.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc83a/2a380d31/26495a92/f00c7b/2979243253/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2hfcm8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for helping -- I'm truly grateful to have you with me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Hello, I'm about to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign but first, I hope you'll allow me to explain why your support now matters so much. I don't make this request lightly -- I ask because of what we're up against. In 2016, dark money and Republican special interest groups poured in millions of dollars (record amounts of money!) to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. When the dust settled,I won by just 1,017 votes. Our fundraising has taken a nosedive in May, and I don't want to think about what happens if we don't bounce back. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Now, with Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans are doing whatever they can to flip this seat. Strong early fundraising is the only way to lock in -- and fund -- our strategy to fend off GOP attacks. But with New Hampshire's expensive media markets and polls showing us down, we need to build up our fundraising ASAP. I truly believe that together we can make a difference. That's why I first ran for office -- to advocate for families and kids who weren't getting the support they needed. And that's the spirit I'm asking you to embrace today. "" Thank you for helping -- I'm truly grateful to have you with me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ""

name: Jonathan Schleifer

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
We want to hear from you.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28769679/284288570/1701945642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA1Y2FmYi1iM2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpIdUPjhddEpDHOgCn4q9GPt3kxNDO2UqKe7vbhsVcY=&emci=4605cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=4705cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582#email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&bsdid=102101357&version=5.6restofdonors) _The Fairness Projects runs and wins people-powered ballot initiatives to expand health care, raise wages, and make real change in red and blue states. If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/4605cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/4705cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA1Y2FmYi1iM2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpIdUPjhddEpDHOgCn4q9GPt3kxNDO2UqKe7vbhsVcY=&id=102101357)._ Hi friend, I’m Jonathan, the executive director here at The Fairness Project. Thanks so much for being a part of the progressive movement fighting for real change across our country. Today I’m excited to tell you about our work at The Fairness Project, how we break through politics as usual to win real change, and why we’d love to have you by our side in these fights. In a minute, **[I’m going to ask you to complete our 2021 Strategy Survey so we can learn a bit about you](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28769680/284288571/1701945642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA1Y2FmYi1iM2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpIdUPjhddEpDHOgCn4q9GPt3kxNDO2UqKe7vbhsVcY=&emci=4605cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=4705cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582#email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&bsdid=102101357&version=5.6restofdonors)**. But first, let me tell you about what we do at The Fairness Project. Millions of Americans need real change -- now. Congress hasn’t raised the federal minimum wage since 2009. Too many people lack access to affordable health care, and out-of-touch politicians refuse to act. Countless families don’t have paid leave. **But over and over again, obstructionist politicians and corporate special interests block progress, putting petty political games over working people.** **Real change is hard. The candidates we expect to win often fall short.** That’s where our team at The Fairness Project comes in. We launch, fund, and run ballot initiative campaigns that cut through the partisan noise and win real change in people’s lives. _When politicians refuse to act, we get to work -- and we change lives._ It’s not a fantasy. **Over the past five years, we’ve won 20 campaigns** to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid, and enact permanent paid leave, **changing the lives of nearly 18 million Americans**. In 2020, we won campaigns for Medicaid expansion in two deep-red states, Oklahoma and Missouri, delivering life-saving care for over 430,000 people. We also won paid family & medical leave in Colorado -- the first time that’s passed at the ballot box -- and ended abusive payday lending in Nebraska. **But we’re just getting started.** We’re already hard at work planning campaigns in 2021, 2022, and beyond. _**All this work is only possible because of grassroots supporters like you.**_ It's going to take a movement of thousands of people fighting for progressive change to beat the special interests and fuel our campaigns -- and we're so excited to have you by our side. Now that you know a bit about us, we want to know about you: **[Can you take just a couple of minutes and complete our New Member Survey so we can learn a little more about you and why you’re in this fight with us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28769681/284288572/1701945642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA1Y2FmYi1iM2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpIdUPjhddEpDHOgCn4q9GPt3kxNDO2UqKe7vbhsVcY=&emci=4605cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=4705cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582#email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&bsdid=102101357&version=5.6restofdonors) ** | **[Take the survey →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28769682/284288573/1701945642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA1Y2FmYi1iM2FlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpIdUPjhddEpDHOgCn4q9GPt3kxNDO2UqKe7vbhsVcY=&emci=4605cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=4705cafb-b3ae-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=561582#email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&bsdid=102101357&version=5.6restofdonors)**
---
In just five years, our proven model of change has:
* Put **over $17 billion -- and counting! -- in the hands of workers** thanks to our campaigns to raise wages;

* Brought **health care to nearly 1 million people** by expanding Medicaid coverage to families who need it;

* Delivered **paid sick leave for over 3 million people** and **paid family & medical leave to over 2 million**.

We’ve won 20 of our first 21 campaigns for economic, racial, and gender justice in red, purple, and blue states. And this year, we’re ready to win more.
Thanks so much, let’s get to work!
Jonathan Schleifer
Executive Director
The Fairness Project

Jennifer is about to step on the debate stage for the third time (and the second time going head-to-head with Terry McAuliffe).

I can assure you that voters will see the clear differences between Jennifer’s vision for Virginia and McAuliffe’s, which is rooted in the past. There’s absolutely no doubt that this race is between the status quo and the future — and the status quo isn’t going to cut it.

**[Do you agree? I’m emailing Jennifer a good luck note in a few hours and I want to include a list of her supporters who have her back. clean_body: | | | Jennifer is about to step on the debate stage for the third time (and the second time going head-to-head with Terry McAuliffe). I can assure you that voters will see the clear differences between Jennifer’s vision for Virginia and McAuliffe’s, which is rooted in the past. There’s absolutely no doubt that this race is between the status quo and the future — and the status quo isn’t going to cut it. Tonight, Democratic voters will have the opportunity to decide if we should continue with politics as usual or create the next chapter in Democratic leadership in Virginia. Jennifer’s vision for Virginia can win. We have a groundswell of support which is why EMILY’s List endorsed Jennifer recently. As a doctor I've seen my patients have to choose between paying for the medical care they desperately need and affording their housing payments.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28770918/284292308/-1282350553?refcode=em210301_launch1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGRlM2E1ZS1iOGFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9a3Jf00wkL1M5nDAK3QZtPnNBoJ6uV9JhZPXJRWfC_o=) Derek, As a doctor I've seen my patients have to choose between paying for the medical care they desperately need and affording their housing payments. And as the only Doctor in the Virginia House I knew that this pandemic was going to show us just how broken our healthcare system truly is. Now, I'm asking for your vote and your support so that I can continue working towards fixing our healthcare system. That means making our systems more equitable and affordable, it means ensuring that women's reproductive care is easily available and fully covered, and it means expanding and prioritizing mental health services as well. [**Together, we've accomplished a lot. But we can't afford to stop now. Check out the video below from my "Check Up" series where I talk about building a healthcare system that works for ALL Virginians.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28770919/284292309/-356321715?refcode=0506_healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGRlM2E1ZS1iOGFlLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9a3Jf00wkL1M5nDAK3QZtPnNBoJ6uV9JhZPXJRWfC_o=)

Peter,
Just because the mainstream media isn’t reporting on the border crisis, doesn’t mean our country is safe and the border is secure.

While we’ve seen the pictures of thousands of detained border crossers, an even greater number of those who illegally crossed the border simply “got away,” according to officials at the border.

We know human traffickers, drug smugglers, cartels and other evil individuals are exploiting the Biden Administration’s border policies — ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

**[Send a message to D.C. While we’ve seen the pictures of thousands of detained border crossers, an even greater number of those who illegally crossed the border simply “got away,” according to officials at the border. We know human traffickers, drug smugglers, cartels and other evil individuals are exploiting the Biden Administration’s border policies — ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. In the 40+ days since Biden tapped Kamala Harris to manage the administration’s response, she hasn’t visited the border once or held a single news conference to answer the very real questions the nation has on this border crisis. That’s not leadership—leadership would be admitting Biden’s border policies have been a total failure and continuing to build the wall that Trump started!! I’m still fighting Biden’s border crisis because the security of our nation is more important than giving Joe and Kamala a pass!! name: Heidi St. John
subject: Your 2nd Amendment rights are not negotiable
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Under an administration where we see frequent attacks on what we know to be our constitutionally defined freedoms, it's critical to know that the representatives you elect are strong supporters of Second Amendment rights. I will OPPOSE any legislation that requires honest gun owners to give up their firearms to federal agencies. I believe the best way to curb violence is to enforce existing laws instead of enacting more laws that only serve to undermine the rights of honest citizens. I'm looking forward to the opportunity to stand up for our rights in Washington D.C.

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Hollywood wants to take me out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal)
body:
Socialists want ONE-PARTY control

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=6ed8498ddffb4c1ebee21767928c756a&_e=vwifU1RxfwBF9P0ZtE2dEr3KLmuuBUbZMnOEA1lmRSkt-Yoyede87D9rt9pydGQkcEQ-B7AVcvoDgww8yU6AcPBcvWXzb-OSl22TQi99aEK0tshX4YwBnsTt5HcrbEh5Wkd-ScDV9oERUABuBaIKJPpJjXGgRTzSl_Fdn3WWDW8SrnASmCNyRXRb8wZd36Vk5Yqhk7OD99A4y_6e5JQ-b1iXdCyBLff21Q01Csp5zKENXgi6uSE0PSoiWQ7wt7EYb3IPjJ1wG-pot1uF24pexbm2DivMBrRx_eLTkThPgKldSc5OwLT5BWoKUYc-Yl5Fp9cMlWtKv1w3Aam842aTFIe_kDthZdEodiBbDmqBTTNIJ_YDxlK_9WO6YbFqQMxdKccA5161XYKDbDKkzEQXjHsoT4QBDJvQ6htPRA92yUAABqgiRrWxHUNv6nUVadXXQ9zyJiX9yJQSo2mW3d3sVBW_t4H4jQbCmh44kHEzlEkxit4VXC-XPDCL1SFG3wMPT7dEvkzg9uT-JjXzyLRjuNF3hFSaRs9V5rb4gkOSomdEdDBJGdPhudflttY-cGSbLnmiYla7I0wFnvUqiY5Erw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

Hollywood has come to New York, and they are here to help elect my socialist opponent. Nobody hates me more than the **Socialists and the Hollywood elites, and I guess that's why they decided to team up to take me out**.

My opponent said she'd join the Squad, and she’s been ACTIVELY RECRUITED by **AOC, Gloria Steinem, Linda Sarsour, and Mark Ruffalo.** Why can’t actors just act and stop pushing a socialist agenda on the American People? **Ruffalo can afford to be a socialist, but hard working Americans can't afford the outrageous tax and spending increases proposed by the far-left.**

clean_body: Socialists want ONE-PARTY control | Friend, Hollywood has come to New York, and they are here to help elect my socialist opponent. Nobody hates me more than the Socialists and the Hollywood elites, and I guess that's why they decided to team up to take me out. My opponent said she'd join the Squad, and she’s been ACTIVELY RECRUITED by AOC, Gloria Steinem, Linda Sarsour, and Mark Ruffalo. Why can’t actors just act and stop pushing a socialist agenda on the American People? Ruffalo can afford to be a socialist, but hard working Americans can't afford the outrageous tax and spending increases proposed by the far-left. Socialists want ONE-PARTY control, and I am the only one standing in their way. They have Hollywood, the Media, and the Elites. I have YOU the American People. | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- Thank you for your support, Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: Border Crisis Alert
subject: (1) Southern border Status EMERGENCY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND
body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: 🚨Don't miss from this week in Washington
body:
COVID & kids, programming update, what I'm reading and more

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/465c0ba1e26b/dont-miss-from-this-week-in-washington?e=f6564bbe3b)
Logo

** What you don’t know about the popular game for kids “Roblox”...
------------------------------------------------------------
https://twitter.com/newsmax/status/1389807066072682497?s=20&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID

The game “Roblox” is hugely popular with elementary aged kids, but you probably don’t know about the “pins” they give out celebrating things like gay pride, trans rights and other identifications I frankly had to google.

My concern is not necessarily with these issues themselves, but the fact that a game is presenting and promoting them to young kids in a setting where their parents aren’t likely around and without any warning in the App Store before downloading.

Check out this segment (https://twitter.com/newsmax/status/1389807066072682497?s=20&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID) from Spicer & Co with Penny Nance and Mercedes Schlapp where we discuss.

** Make sure to set your DVR for Spicer & Co...
------------------------------------------------------------

Starting next week Newsmax will have a new 9p show, so Spicer & Co will no longer re-air at 9p. If you’re one of our views that tunes in the 9p hour, make sure you set your DVR to record the 6p show so you don’t miss it.

Thanks for tuning in and make sure to tune in next week, we’re taking the show on the road, details to come...

** The effect of COVID shutdowns and masks on kids...
------------------------------------------------------------

The past year has affected everyone, but the impact on kids has been largely under reported on.

The New York Times put out an impactful story (https://www.nytimes.com/2021/05/05/us/remote-learning-education-pandemic.html?action=click&module=Top%20Stories&pgtype=Homepage&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID) this week highlighting how this has impacted learning and how kids are really being hurt by a highly politicized issue of keeping schools closed.
https://twitter.com/Newsweek/status/1385656891716558849?s=20&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID

Check out this mom’s plea (https://twitter.com/Newsweek/status/1385656891716558849?s=20&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID) to a school board in Georgia.

Tune in to Spicer & Co tonight for a segment as a part of our “Kids and Culture” series with Dr. Drew and Art Kleinschmidt, where they will explain the lasting impact on this generation of kids.

This week the Pentagon announced that they will be investigating the, “extent to which the DoD has taken actions regarding Unidentified Aerial Phenomena.” (https://thehill.com/policy/defense/551986-pentagon-watchdog-investigating-military-handling-of-ufo-sightings?mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID) So my question is...
https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1390393751542042631?s=20&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID
https://www.amazon.com/House-John-Boehner/dp/1250238447?dchild=1&keywords=boehner&qid=1620330517&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=5f584d99690ed91318d3defa97f2d787&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID

** What I’m reading this week...
------------------------------------------------------------

For a real inside look at what goes on in Washington and on Capitol Hill check out, “On The House” (https://www.amazon.com/House-John-Boehner/dp/1250238447?dchild=1&keywords=boehner&qid=1620330517&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=5f584d99690ed91318d3defa97f2d787&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID) by former speaker John Boehner.
Check it out here (https://www.amazon.com/House-John-Boehner/dp/1250238447?dchild=1&keywords=boehner&qid=1620330517&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=5f584d99690ed91318d3defa97f2d787&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID)
https://www.instagram.com/p/COiOR3YjwzM/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID

** Follow along on social media:
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/seanmspicer?mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID https://www.instagram.com/seanmspicer/?mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID https://twitter.com/seanspicer?mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID https://seanspicer.com?mc_cid=353ddb9ab3&mc_eid=UNIQID mailto:contact@seanspicer.com

More than 400 supporters have completed our 45-second survey — but you still haven’t!
#
Hey there, it’s Erica. Happy Thursday!!!
I just wanted to make sure you had an opportunity to take our official Erica Smith for U.S. Senate campaign strategy survey.
[**_According to our records, more than 400 supporters have completed our 45-second survey — but you still haven’t._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202105-survey/?source=em20210506-67&t=1&akid=67%2E3698%2EOLBuyv)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202105-survey/?source=em20210506-67&t=2&akid=67%2E3698%2EOLBuyv)**
This survey is your chance to communicate directly with me! I’m running for U.S. Senate to represent _all of us_. [**_So it’s important that I hear from as many folks as possible as we start mapping out a game plan over the summer._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202105-survey/?source=em20210506-67&t=3&akid=67%2E3698%2EOLBuyv)
_I really want to know:_
What issues should our campaign focus on most?
Do folks understand how competitive North Carolina will be in 2022?
What is our campaign doing well so far?
[**_I’ll be looking closely at your answers!!! So, please do me a favor and complete our official campaign strategy survey today. Hearing from the PEOPLE is critical as we start to map out our campaign strategy for the coming months._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202105-survey/?source=em20210506-67&t=4&akid=67%2E3698%2EOLBuyv)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-202105-survey/?source=em20210506-67&t=5&akid=67%2E3698%2EOLBuyv)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210506-67-footer&t=6&refcode2=67_3698_OLBuyv&akid=67%2E3698%2EOLBuyv)**

Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

Peter,

I'm in the fight of my life to defeat Devin Nunes, and I'm determined to do it without dirty donations from corporate PACs and special interests.

[So if you support my campaign to defeat Devin Nunes, one of the absolute worst MAGA Members of Congress, will you chip in $22 to flip California's 22nd Congressional District blue?](https://go.philarballo.com/page/m/5a5130b3/4bafd2b5/62c9630a/6e828347/2814345115/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVjlmUT09IjoibWNfYXJiYWxsb19xMjIwMjFfZGYiLCJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiUEFGQ18yMDIxMDUwNl9FTURGX0UxX1QwX0FDIn0%3D/?g=Z7egLVNw52hexMKDMCdLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_arballo_q22021_df?refcode=PAFC_20210506_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&amount=22&amounts=11,22,44") | [CHIP IN $22 TO FLIP CA-22 »](https://go.philarballo.com/page/m/5a5130b3/4bafd2b5/62c9630a/6e828347/2814345115/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVjlmUT09IjoibWNfYXJiYWxsb19xMjIwMjFfZGYiLCJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiUEFGQ18yMDIxMDUwNl9FTURGX0UxX1QwX0FDIn0%3D/?g=Z7egLVNw52hexMKDMCdLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_arballo_q22021_df?refcode=PAFC_20210506_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&amount=22&amounts=11,22,44")

Unlike corrupt Nunes, I'm proud of the fact I don't take a dime of corporate interest money.

_This is an entirely people-powered, progressive movement to oust him._

That means to win, I depend on good grassroots Democrats like you to fund this campaign.

Every single dollar you chip in to flip Devin Nunes's seat blue will go directly towards funding this operation to beat him. That means hiring staff, putting up yard signs and ads, and reaching more places in this district that are constantly ignored by Nunes.

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to support Democrat Phil Arballo by clicking here](https://go.philarballo.com/page/m/5a5130b3/4bafd2b5/62c9630a/6e82837b/2814345115/VEsHBQ/?g=Z7egLVNw52hexMKDMCdLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_arballo_hf?refcode=footer-lnk-single&amount=10&recurring=0"). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust the worst MAGA Republican in Congress, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://go.philarballo.com/page/m/5a5130b3/4bafd2b5/62c9630a/6e828378/2814345115/VEsHBA/?g=Z7egLVNw52hexMKDMCdLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_arballo_hf?refcode=footer-lnk-recur&amount=10&recurring=1").**

body:
Hi -- bumping this note from the Senator because if we raise $3,415 before midnight, our fundraising will be in _much_ better shape.
We'll still have work to do to swing the polls in our favor (this campaign will be touch-and-go until the very end), but if we raise that extra money before midnight, we'll be a lot more comfortable with our path to victory.
[**Could you please donate $3 or whatever you can to protect New Hampshire 's extremely vulnerable Senate seat and Democrats' fragile majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc837/2a380d31/264cd729/f00ced/809201293/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2gta19ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh-k_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you!
_\---------------Original Message---------------_
Hello,
I'm about to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign but first, I hope you'll allow me to explain why your support now matters so much.
I don't make this request lightly -- I ask because of what we're up against.
In 2016, dark money and Republican special interest groups poured in millions of dollars (record amounts of money!) to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. When the dust settled,**I won by just 1,017 votes.**
Our fundraising has taken a nosedive in May, and I don't want to think about what happens if we don't bounce back. [**I have to ask: Will you please give $3 or more right now to protect New Hampshire 's vulnerable Senate seat and our Democratic majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc837/2a380d31/264cd729/f00ced/809201293/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2gta19ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh-k_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc837/2a380d31/264cd729/f00cef/809201293/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2gta19ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh-k_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc837/2a380d31/264cd729/f00ce8/809201293/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2gta19ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh-k_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc837/2a380d31/264cd729/f00ced/809201293/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2gta19ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh-k_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

Strong early fundraising is the only way to lock in -- and fund -- our strategy to fend off GOP attacks. But with New Hampshire's expensive media markets and polls showing us down, **we need to build up our fundraising ASAP.**
I truly believe that together we can make a difference. That's why I first ran for office -- to advocate for families and kids who weren't getting the support they needed. And that's the spirit I'm asking you to embrace today. [**If you 're able, please make a critically important donation right now.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc837/2a380d31/264cd729/f00ced/809201293/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDUwNl9td2gta19ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210506_mwh-k_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for helping -- I'm truly grateful to have you with me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

We'll still have work to do to swing the polls in our favor (this campaign will be touch-and-go until the very end), but if we raise that extra money before midnight, we'll be a lot more comfortable with our path to victory. "" Thank you! \---------------Original Message--------------- Hello, I'm about to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign but first, I hope you'll allow me to explain why your support now matters so much. I don't make this request lightly -- I ask because of what we're up against. In 2016, dark money and Republican special interest groups poured in millions of dollars (record amounts of money!) to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. When the dust settled,I won by just 1,017 votes. Our fundraising has taken a nosedive in May, and I don't want to think about what happens if we don't bounce back. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Now, with Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans are doing whatever they can to flip this seat. Strong early fundraising is the only way to lock in -- and fund -- our strategy to fend off GOP attacks. But with New Hampshire's expensive media markets and polls showing us down, we need to build up our fundraising ASAP. I truly believe that together we can make a difference. That's why I first ran for office -- to advocate for families and kids who weren't getting the support they needed. And that's the spirit I'm asking you to embrace today. "" Thank you for helping -- I'm truly grateful to have you with me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan "" _
